rules.title: Risk it Rook
rules.description: 50% chance for a free Rook in a random empty square. Your opponent gets 25% chance for the same thing.

rules.title: Anti-Camping
rules.description: Pick an enemy Piece, swap it with a random friendly Piece

rules.title: Estrogen
rules.description: Your King can move like 2 Queens

rules.title: Invulnerability Potion
rules.description: Two random Pieces on your team cannot die

rules.title: Sunday School
rules.description: Do random Sporcle quiz on religion, whoever's better gets a Bishop in chosen empty square

rules.title: The Enemy is Routed
rules.description: All enemy Pieces move one square backwards (if open)

rules.title: Horse 1 Always Wins
rules.description: Watch a horse race, whoever's horse places higher gets a Knight in a chosen empty square

rules.title: Column Swap
rules.description: All Pieces in two random columns are swapped

rules.title: Mr Freeze
rules.description: Pick 1 column, All Pieces in it are frozen

rules.title: Short Stop
rules.description: Pieces may move a maximum of 1 square per turn

rules.title: God Kings
rules.description: Kings are immune and can move 2 squares at once

rules.title: Back That Shit Up
rules.description: All Pawns move backward one square (if open)

rules.title: Born Again Christian
rules.description: All Queens becomes Bishops

rules.title: Nuclear Fallout
rules.description: 2 random empty squares cannot be entered or crossed for the rest of the game

rules.title: Hobbit Slaughter
rules.description: Only Pawns can die

rules.title: 2 Kids in a Trenchcoat
rules.description: Sacrifice 2 Pawns to put a new Bishop anywhere on the board

rules.title: Going Woke
rules.description: All Pieces in the right half of the board get pushed to the left 1 square (if open)

rules.title: Summoning Ritual
rules.description: When this expires, whichever Player has more Pieces on the 4 corner spots gets a Rook at a chosen empty square

rules.title: They Deserved It
rules.description: One random non-King Piece is killed

rules.title: Bottomless Pit
rules.description: Pick an empty square. For the rest of the game, any Piece who enters it dies

rules.title: Mitosis
rules.description: Pick a Piece. It cannot move, but if it's alive when this rule expires, spawn a duplicate of the Piece into an empty adjacent square

rules.title: No Cowards
rules.description: All moves must move closer to your opponent's side of the board

rules.title: Minefield
rules.description: Mark 2 random empty squares. If a Piece enters that square, they die and the mine is removed

rules.title: Treasure Chest
rules.description: Select a random empty square. The first Piece to enter that square is promoted

rules.title: Portal 3
rules.description: Pick 2 squares. At the end of every turn, those two squares swap

rules.title: Living Bomb
rules.description: Pick a friendly Piece. If it's alive when this rule expires, it explodes and kills all adjacent pieces

rules.title: Drafted for Battle
rules.description: Both Players swap their King with a friendly Bishop or Knight of their choice

rules.title: Severe Constipation
rules.description: Bishops and Knights cannot move

rules.title: Pacman Style
rules.description: Pieces can wrap around the right and left sides of the board

rules.title: Hobbit Battle
rules.description: Only Pawns can be moved

rules.title: Second Chance
rules.description: When any Piece dies, 50% chance it is revived in a random empty square

rules.title: Cash Grab
rules.description: Any Piece that reaches the back line can promote

rules.title: Gigachad Aura
rules.description: When this expires, all Pieces adjacent to a King die

rules.title: Get Up In Their Face
rules.description: All your Pieces slide forward until they hit an empty square

rules.title: CHAAAARGE!
rules.description: All your Pieces move one square towards the enemy (if open)

rules.title: Tornado
rules.description: Pick an empty square. If any Piece can move to that square, it must

rules.title: Kamikaze
rules.description: When a Piece dies, 25% chance that ALL adjacent Pieces die

rules.title: Blood Sacrifice
rules.description: Players pick one of their own pieces to die after every turn

rules.title: Early Promotion
rules.description: Pawns promote on the 6th row instead of the 8th

rules.title: Call Down Lightning
rules.description: Mark a random empty square. When this expires, whoever controls that square chooses an enemy piece to die

rules.title: Hot Drop
rules.description: Each Player gets a Queen in a random open square (they cannot attack King this turn)

rules.title: Ice Age
rules.description: Pieces in columns 1 and 8 are frozen

rules.title: Bloodthirsty
rules.description: You must make a move that captures an enemy (if possible)

rules.title: Moving Up the Corporate Ladder
rules.description: Pick 2 Pieces in the same column, then swap them

rules.title: Portal Storm
rules.description: Two random non-King Pieces swap places at the end of every turn

rules.title: March of the Pawnguins
rules.description: All Pawns advance one square if it's empty (no captures)

rules.title: Parry
rules.description: Rock Paper Scissors for a chance to stop any attack

rules.title: Get The Fuck Off
rules.description: Pick 2 squares on the board. When this expires, any Pieces on those squares die

rules.title: Down with the Ship
rules.description: Any capture also kills the capturing Piece

rules.title: Critical Strike
rules.description: Every capture has a 50% chance to capture a random adjacent enemy Piece

rules.title: Time Bomb
rules.description: All Pieces in Column E die when this rule expires

rules.title: Religious Conversion
rules.description: If a Bishop moves next to an enemy Pawn, you convert it to your team

rules.title: Sophie's Choice
rules.description: Each player selects 2 random friendly Pieces, then picks one to kill

rules.title: Hurricane
rules.description: Pick 1 row, all Pieces in it are pushed to the leftmost empty square
